name: Sergiu Munteanu
title: Sergiu Munteanu — Photography
description: Sergiu Munteanu — Professional black & white photographer specializing in weddings, events, and fine-art portraits.
subtitle: Capturing timeless moments in black & white

about.heading: About Me
paragraphs: I'm Sergiu Munteanu, a photographer driven by the power of light and shadow. My work focuses on black & white imagery — stripping away color to reveal the raw emotion and timeless beauty in every frame.

From intimate wedding moments to vibrant event atmospheres, I document stories that deserve to be remembered. Every photograph I take is crafted with intention, patience, and a deep respect for the subject.

contact.heading: Get in Touch
contact.intro: Interested in working together? Send me a message and let's create something beautiful.
